texto: The wonders of the Grand Canyon cannot be adequately represented in symbols of speech, nor by speech itself. The resources of the graphic art are taxed beyond their powers in attempting to portray its features. Language and illustration combined must fail.
explicacao: Orientação direta de John Wesley Powell sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “The wonders of the Grand Canyon cannot be adequately represented in symbols of speech, nor by spe…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a autoestima, language, speech, útil em momentos de speech e symbols.
